name: Raven - Capture a HVT
description:
Task Element 3-1 has been sent to capture a HVT, death of the HVT will lead to a mission failure. operators must RTB.

[CLASSIFIED // NOFORN]

UNIT DESIGNATION

Unit: 1st SFOD-D (CAG).
Temporary Tasking: Task Element 3-1.
Mission Type: Deniable Direct Action / HVT Capture.
Operation Name: The Hunt.

[CLASSIFIED // NOFORN]

STRATEGIC CONTEXT

Region: Undisclosed (Middle East / Desert AO).
Timeframe: Ongoing.
Tasking Authority: JSOC-Directed Tasking.


Task Element 3-1

Call Sign: SPECTER

  • Captain Raven “Specter” Hale

  • Staff Sergeant Marvin “Ocone” Sheffield

  • Sergeant First Class Jamerson “Viper” James

  • Sergeant Lucas “Lockjaw” Reed

  • Sergeant Ethan “Patch” Morales

    BACKGROUND:
    Recent intelligence indicates a surge in advanced weapons transfers to multiple non-state actors operating across the region. These transfers have directly contributed to increased instability, proxy engagements, and attacks against U.S. and allied interests.

Signals and human intelligence have identified Khalid al-Saffar as a key facilitator within this network. Al-Saffar operates as an intermediary, brokering weapons sales between state-level stockpiles and non-state buyers, while maintaining plausible deniability through shell entities and private security forces.

Conventional interdiction options have been assessed as politically untenable due to host-nation sensitivities and the risk of escalation.

STRATEGIC OBJECTIVE:
The primary objective is to disrupt regional weapons proliferation by removing al-Saffar from the network intact. His capture is assessed to provide actionable intelligence on supply routes, financial intermediaries, and upcoming transfers.

Lethal action against the HVT is authorized only if capture is no longer feasible and compromise is imminent.

Goodluck Operators.
